projects.name: Travertine House

lines: A house is not a collection of rooms.
It is a framework for living.

materiality.heading: Material, first.
materiality.body: A narrow palette, left to texture, weight and light.

images.alt: Extreme close-up of a travertine edge in grazing light

transition.alt: Sculptural concrete spiral staircase rising through light

studio_section.label: The Studio
studio_section.heading: One studio. A few projects at a time.
studio_section.image_alt: Elias Wren, founding director, reviewing drawings inside a completed project
paragraphs: A small practice working on a few houses at a time, directly with each client, from first sketch to final detail. No house style. Only patience, material, and light.

journal.label: Journal
journal.intro: Notes, drawings and observations from the studio.

entries.title: Drawing as thinking
entries.alt: Tracing paper, plans, hand sketches and material samples on a studio table

entries.title: The model as argument
entries.alt: Hands adjusting a physical architectural scale model beside drawings

entries.title: On the weight of light
entries.alt: Shadow moving across a concrete wall

contact.heading: Begin a conversation.
contact.body: We take on a limited number of new projects each year. If you're considering a new home, a renovation or an interior, we'd be glad to hear from you.

closing.alt: Atmospheric residence at dusk with a softly glowing interior

footer.legal: Atelier Architecture is a fictional brand created as a design & front-end portfolio piece.
